{# list.html — Vendor list page with HTMX search, sort headers, bulk select, detail drawer. Receives: vendors (list), page, total_pages, q, sort, dir. Called by: views.py vendors_page endpoint. Depends on: vendor_row.html, pagination.html, HTMX, Alpine.js. #} {% extends "base.html" %} {% block title %}Vendors — AvailAI{% endblock %} {% block content %}

Vendors

{# Search toolbar #}
{# Sortable table with bulk select #}

Name Health Score Contacts Last Activity
{% include "partials/shared/empty_state.html" with context %}
{% if total_pages > 1 %} {% with url="/views/vendors/rows", target_id="vendor-table-body" %} {% include "partials/shared/pagination.html" %} {% endwith %} {% endif %} {# Detail drawer — filled via HTMX when a row is clicked #}
{% endblock %}
